item.description:
• Fix: The Today view now stays current as the clock advances — the date label and daily total update in real time without needing to reopen the menu.
  • Feature: If a timer is still running past midnight, it now appears in both Today and the previous day's history, so you never lose sight of an active session.
  • Fix: The daily total no longer drops unexpectedly when a timer that was started yesterday is stopped today.
  • Fix: An active cross-midnight timer entry in Today now shows the correct elapsed time and a live "start–now" time range instead of an incorrect end time.
  • Fix: Edit, resume, and delete controls are no longer shown on the active-timer row in Today, preventing accidental edits to a still-running timer.
